rationale: Three corroborated geopolitical indicators meet escalation threshold against HIGH-rated Houston Operations Center. China rare earth export controls directly threaten AME wind turbine supply chain and elevate state-actor IP collection incentives targeting wind farm telemetry (NA-01) and predictive maintenance IP. US Commerce Department national security investigation into wind turbine imports (tariff threat 11-50%) compounds procurement risk. Mexico energy sovereignty posture raises foreign-operator regulatory exposure. Top financial scenario (System intrusion, rank 3) aligns with state-actor IP-theft vector. Cyber gap is an evidentiary absence, not a clean signal.
